<!--
Thanks for reporting a bug! Please fill in as much as you can — the environment
details and steps to reproduce are what let us actually fix it.

Security issue? Do NOT file it here. See SECURITY.md for private reporting.
-->

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

- **macOS version:** <!-- e.g. macOS 26.1 -->
- **Chip:** <!-- Apple Silicon model, e.g. M3 Pro (arm64) -->
- **Vee version:** <!-- e.g. 0.1.1 — see the About window -->
- **Install method:** <!-- notarized .app download / `swift run vee` / built locally -->

## Plugin involved

<!-- If a specific plugin triggers the bug, paste its filename (which encodes the
refresh interval, e.g. cpu.5s.sh) and, if you can share it, the plugin source or
a minimal version that reproduces the issue. Redact any tokens/secrets. -->

- **Plugin filename:**
- **Language / interpreter:**
- **Source (or a minimal repro):**

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Screenshots of the menu-bar item / dropdown help.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Logs / output

<!-- Any error output, plugin stdout/stderr, or Console.app messages. Paste plugin
output verbatim in a code block so the format is preserved. -->

```
<paste logs or plugin output here>
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (recent changes, does it happen with every plugin
or just one, etc.).
